business.name: Clance Company Multiservice
business.tagline: Professional painting and home services in Macon

hero.headline: *Matt's crew* fixes whatever needs fixing
hero.subheadline: From emergency roof tarps in the rain to pristine paint jobs — we show up when Macon needs us most.

services_section.label: WHAT WE HANDLE
services_section.heading: Paint, Fix, Clean — Done Right
services_section.subheading: No project too small, no emergency too urgent

services.title: Interior & Exterior Painting
services.description: From staining new construction to refreshing old walls — we handle brushes and sprayers with equal precision.

services.title: Roofing Repairs
services.description: Leaks don't wait for good weather. Neither do we. Emergency tarps and permanent fixes.

services.title: Yard Maintenance
services.description: Grass cutting, limb removal, leaf cleanup. Your yard, looking like you always wanted.

services.title: Home Repairs
services.description: Partially finished projects? Construction issues? We step in and get things done right.

about.heading: The Clance Company Story
about.body: Matt Clance built this business on one simple idea: when Macon homeowners need help, we show up. Whether it's an emergency roof repair in the rain or a meticulous paint job that transforms your home, our crew treats every project like it's our own house. Based right here in Macon, we've earned our reputation one satisfied neighbor at a time.

reviews_section.label: WORD AROUND TOWN
reviews_section.heading: What Macon Says About Matt's Work

reviews.name: Mandi H.
reviews.text: Matt and his crew saved us! Came out the week after we called and finished a project perfectly. So professional.

reviews.name: Michael F.
reviews.text: Not your average painters! Very professional crew, competitive prices, A+++ work. Will definitely use again.

reviews.name: Danielle A.
reviews.text: Our roof started leaking in pouring rain. Matt came out immediately and put a tarp up while it was still raining. Amazing service.

reviews.name: Bridgette A.
reviews.text: Matt did extraordinary staining and painting work on our new home. His expertise and quality requirements really showed.

cta.heading: Ready to Get Started?
cta.body: Call Matt today for your free estimate. Whether it's painting, repairs, or emergency work — we're here to help.
